## Responders (1)

*Trigger automated responses*

### [SendGrid v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/responders/SendGrid)
Send an email with information from a TheHive case or alert via SendGrid API over HTTPS

- **Author:** Equate Technologies
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `thehive:case`, `thehive:alert`
